form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (24.55) at Bendigo over 425m. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but swamped late when a close up fifth (24.55) at Bendigo over 425m. Some good form is emerging from that last run. Expected to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.37) at Bendigo in a Special conditions H, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Among the chances on best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.37) at Bendigo in a Special conditions H, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Among the chances on best.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Mix 6/7 on April 9 over 410m at this track behind Pouring Chandon beaten 7 lengths (24.14). Has the ability to take this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 4th in a Mix 6/7 on April 9 over 410m at this track behind Pouring Chandon beaten 7 lengths (24.14). Has the ability to take this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Checked turning into home straight and pulled up.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Shepparton to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.62, beating Miss Bobbie. Last start finished 4th on March 31 over 425m at Bendigo behind Basement beaten 7 lengths (24.59) in a Special conditions H. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at Shepparton to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.62, beating Miss Bobbie. Last start finished 4th on March 31 over 425m at Bendigo behind Basement beaten 7 lengths (24.59) in a Special conditions H. Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked on turn off back straight and fell.

form.formComment: Last start finished eighth over 425m at Bendigo, beaten 14 lengths (24.51) behind Biscottino in a R/A FIN on April 5. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished eighth over 425m at Bendigo, beaten 14 lengths (24.51) behind Biscottino in a R/A FIN on April 5. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Marred approaching winning post.

form.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Mix 6/7 on March 10 over 410m at this track behind On The River, beaten 9 lengths (23.80). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fifth in a Mix 6/7 on March 10 over 410m at this track behind On The River, beaten 9 lengths (23.80). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recently finished 7th over 425m at Bendigo beaten 17 lengths (25.03) behind Who She Rules in a Special conditions H on March 31. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recently finished 7th over 425m at Bendigo beaten 17 lengths (25.03) behind Who She Rules in a Special conditions H on March 31. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (23.03) at Shepparton over 390m. Racing well and can find winning form again.
